name: HR Workflow：到職離職信件自動匯入 (純Regex + 分流防呆版)

nodes.name: Outlook 收信觸發：到職 (收件匣)
Outlook 收信觸發：離職 (離職資料夾)

parameters.query:
-- person-upsert：同名 pending 收到帶新日期的新進人員通知時更新既有列
UPDATE onboardings ob SET
  expected_date = NULLIF('{{ $json.scheduled_onboard_date || '' }}', '')::DATE,
  department = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.department || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), ob.department),
  position = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.position || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), ob.position),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' LIKE '%新進人員通知%'
  AND NULLIF('{{ $json.scheduled_onboard_date || '' }}', '') IS NOT NULL
  AND ob.name = '{{ ($json.name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  AND ob.status = 'pending'
  AND ob.email_msg_id <> '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}'
  AND ob.expected_date IS DISTINCT FROM NULLIF('{{ $json.scheduled_onboard_date || '' }}', '')::DATE
  AND ob.expected_date BETWEEN NULLIF('{{ $json.scheduled_onboard_date || '' }}', '')::DATE - 60 AND NULLIF('{{ $json.scheduled_onboard_date || '' }}', '')::DATE + 60;

WITH inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO onboardings (name, department, position, expected_date, status, email_subject, email_msg_id, email_web_link)
  SELECT
    '{{ ($json.name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.department || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), '未分類'),
    COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ ($json.position || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), '未知職位'),
    COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.scheduled_onboard_date || '' }}', '')::DATE, CURRENT_DATE),
    'pending',
    '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}',
    NULLIF('{{ $json.email_web_link || '' }}', '')
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM onboardings ob
    WHERE ob.name = '{{ ($json.name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
      AND ob.status <> 'cancelled'
      AND ob.expected_date BETWEEN COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.scheduled_onboard_date || '' }}', '')::DATE, CURRENT_DATE) - 60
                               AND COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.scheduled_onboard_date || '' }}', '')::DATE, CURRENT_DATE) + 60
  )
  ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING department, position
)
UPDATE job_requisitions j
SET headcount = GREATEST(j.headcount - 1, 0)
WHERE j.status = 'open'
  AND j.headcount > 0
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM inserted i
    WHERE i.department = j.department
      AND i.position = j.position_title
  );

SELECT '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}' AS email_msg_id, 'inserted' AS action, NULL::INTEGER AS candidate_id,
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS email_subject,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender || '' }}', '') AS sender,
  '{{ $json.received_at || '' }}' AS received_at;

INSERT INTO resignations (name, department, position, resign_date, last_day, status, email_subject, email_msg_id, email_web_link)
SELECT
  '{{ ($json.name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.department || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.position || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.last_day || '' }}', '')::DATE, CURRENT_DATE),
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.last_day || '' }}', '')::DATE, CURRENT_DATE),
  'active',
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.email_web_link || '' }}', '')
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO NOTHING;

SELECT '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}' AS email_msg_id, 'inserted' AS action, NULL::INTEGER AS candidate_id,
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS email_subject,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender || '' }}', '') AS sender,
  '{{ $json.received_at || '' }}' AS received_at;

INSERT INTO email_logs (email_msg_id, email_subject, sender, received_at, action, candidate_id)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}',
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender || '' }}', ''),
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.received_at || '' }}', '')::TIMESTAMPTZ, NOW()),
  'inserted',
  NULL
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO UPDATE SET
  action = 'updated', processed_at = NOW();

SELECT '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}' AS email_msg_id, 'log_inserted' AS status;

INSERT INTO email_logs (email_msg_id, email_subject, sender, received_at, action, candidate_id)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}',
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender || '' }}', ''),
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.received_at || '' }}', '')::TIMESTAMPTZ, NOW()),
  'inserted',
  NULL
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO UPDATE SET
  action = 'updated', processed_at = NOW();

SELECT '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}' AS email_msg_id, 'log_inserted' AS status;

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.item.json;
return {
  model: "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
  max_tokens: 400,
  system: "You are an HR email parser for onboarding notices. Return pure JSON only.
HR owners: Peggy, Yen, Evan.

Output fields:
- intent: new_onboard | update_date | cancel | skip
- name: candidate name. Prefer the last segment after '-' in subject when it is clearly a person name; otherwise infer from body.
- scheduled_onboard_date: onboarding date in YYYY-MM-DD
- department: department text from the email, or null
- position: title text from the email, or null
- hr_owner: HR owner name, or null

Rules:
1. Do not skip a message only because the subject starts with RE:. Read the body first.
2. If the body says the onboarding date/time was adjusted, delayed, changed, moved, postponed, or contains wording like 改為, 改到, 延後, 延至, 更改報到, 調整報到, then intent = update_date.
3. If the message is only an acknowledgement, attachment submission, receipt confirmation, or generic reply without a new onboarding date, then intent = skip.
4. If the message is a fresh offer/onboarding notice, intent = new_onboard.
5. Even for reply threads, if the latest body contains a new onboarding date, return update_date and that newest date.",
  messages: [
    {
      role: "user",
      content: "Subject: " + item.email_subject + "

" + item.body_text
    }
  ]
};

parameters.query:
UPDATE onboardings
SET expected_date = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.scheduled_onboard_date || '' }}', '')::DATE, expected_date),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE name = '{{ ($json.name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  AND status = 'pending';

SELECT '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}' AS email_msg_id, 'updated' AS action, NULL::INTEGER AS candidate_id,
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS email_subject,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender || '' }}', '') AS sender,
  '{{ $json.received_at || '' }}' AS received_at;

UPDATE onboardings
SET status = 'cancelled', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE name = '{{ ($json.name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  AND status = 'pending';

SELECT '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}' AS email_msg_id, 'updated' AS action, NULL::INTEGER AS candidate_id,
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS email_subject,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender || '' }}', '') AS sender,
  '{{ $json.received_at || '' }}' AS received_at;

INSERT INTO email_logs (email_msg_id, email_subject, sender, received_at, action, candidate_id)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}',
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender || '' }}', ''),
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.received_at || '' }}', '')::TIMESTAMPTZ, NOW()),
  'skipped',
  NULL
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO UPDATE SET
  action = 'skipped', processed_at = NOW();

SELECT '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}' AS email_msg_id, 'log_inserted' AS status;

INSERT INTO email_logs (email_msg_id, email_subject, sender, received_at, action, candidate_id)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}',
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender || '' }}', ''),
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.received_at || '' }}', '')::TIMESTAMPTZ, NOW()),
  '{{ $json.action || 'inserted' }}',
  NULL
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO UPDATE SET
  action = EXCLUDED.action, processed_at = NOW();

SELECT '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}' AS email_msg_id, 'log_inserted' AS status;

INSERT INTO email_logs (email_msg_id, email_subject, sender, received_at, action, candidate_id)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}',
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender || '' }}', ''),
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.received_at || '' }}', '')::TIMESTAMPTZ, NOW()),
  '{{ $json.action || 'inserted' }}',
  NULL
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO UPDATE SET
  action = EXCLUDED.action, processed_at = NOW();

SELECT '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}' AS email_msg_id, 'log_inserted' AS status;

const item = $input.item.json;
return {
  model: "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",

  system: "You are an HR email parser for onboarding notices. Return pure JSON only.
HR owners: Peggy, Yen, Evan.

- intent: new_onboard | update_date | cancel | skip
- name: candidate name. Prefer the last segment after '-' in subject when it is clearly a person name; otherwise infer from body.

UPDATE onboardings
SET expected_date = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.scheduled_onboard_date || '' }}', '')::DATE, expected_date),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE name = '{{ ($json.name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  AND status = 'pending';

SET status = 'cancelled', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE name = '{{ ($json.name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  AND status = 'pending';
